'''Jakaitis''' was a [[Bakuran]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the supervisor of a cleaning crew for the [[Bakur Memorial Building]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
